title: Self-Storage Investing
subtitle: Recession-resistant, management-light, and still fragmented
description: Self-storage has outperformed nearly every other CRE asset class over the last 20 years. This course covers why storage is so profitable, how to underwrite a facility, the three main acquisition strategies (mom-and-pop conversions, ground-up development, portfolio plays), and Florida-specific storage market dynamics.
outcomes: Underwrite a self-storage facility using square foot, unit mix, and rate economics
Identify mom-and-pop facilities ripe for professional management
Understand REIT comps (Public Storage, Extra Space, CubeSmart) and what they mean for private buyers
Apply revenue management (ECRI) to drive existing-customer rent growth
